behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the target file (packages/astro/src/vite-plugin-css/index.ts), the function (ensureModulesLoaded), the const file, and the virtual module IDs that tests check for.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (dev server hangs) and points to relevant files but doesn't state the exact guard code to add.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_guard_prevents_deadlock asserts the literal string 'imp.id === RESOLVED_MODULE_DEV_CSS' in built output, forcing a specific variable name and comparison form; an alternative correct fix using e.g. a Set.has() check or destructured constant name would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run tsc, build, biome lint, and execute node to import the built module, though one test also inspects built JS text.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_guard_prevents_deadlock requires the specific guard with continue in built output; a stub couldn't satisfy this plus build/import tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction requires build success, TS compile, lint pass — all tested; underlying deadlock fix is indirectly verified via guard pattern check.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings explaining each purpose.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references files/functions by name which is appropriate scoping; does not give line numbers or exact code.
